channel.title: Vintage Story Mod DB - Latest Updates
channel.description: Newest mod releases and updates from the Vintage Story Mod DB

item.title: Dishware
item.description: Adds ceramic dishes such as plates and cups.

item.title: Extreme Weathers [ALPHA]
item.description: Introduces new extreme weather events. Blizzards, sandstorms, tornadoes, hurricanes and more!

item.title: Spaturno and Trini's Secure Shelter
item.description: Shared extradimensional cottage inspired from D&D spell Leomund's Secure Shelter.

item.title: TinkerTailor - Backpacks
item.description: More backpacks & pouches for the veteran seraph. Made with love & pain, No AI.

item.title: Just Poop It
item.description: Everything poops... now your character does too.

item.title: Discord Pigeon To Ingame
item.description: Deliver Discord messages as signed parchments to players' inventories

item.title: Downed
item.description: Replaces the vanilla downed state with a survivable, invulnerable downed state. Quite bloody.

item.title: Elk Variants
item.description: Adds more varieties of tamed elk

item.title: SoldierSpy - Brassworks
item.description: An expansion upon what can be done with brass. Made with love & pain. No AI.

item.title: All Classes Rebalanced - Unofficial Patch
item.description: An AllClasses patch focused on balanced traits, class identity, new recipes and cooperation.

item.title: The Gravestones Mod - 1.22.3
item.description: Adds a gravestone which stores the players inventory upon death and can be retrieved by them later.

item.title: Textured Building
item.description: Adds a placement mode for easier texturing which places a random block from your hotbar

item.title: Murlok Vintage Server Patch
item.description: Collection of tweaks for the Murlok server and playthrough.

item.title: Kaschperle Class Mix
item.description: A revision mix from the popular class mod Aldi classes and Agi's Classes

item.title: CB Patches
item.description: JSON content patches for my small personal server

item.title: The Crown & The Coalition Server Tweaks
item.description: Server tweaks for The Crown & The Coalition.

item.title: Elk Adornments
item.description: Masks for you and your elk with Modular Elk Armor!

item.title: Frontiers Lootboxes
item.description: The weighted reward-roll item class other Frontier mods build on.

item.title: Frontiers RPG
item.description: An ARPG system for Vintage Story

item.title: Frontiers Classes
item.description: Character class and progression system.

item.title: Tethys Tweaks
item.description: Tweaks for a personal private server.

item.title: Temporal Convergence
item.description: Expands the creatures emerging from temporal rifts with new eldritch entities, afflicted automatons,

item.title: Frontiers Durability
item.description: A simple clothing degradation mod

item.title: Temporal Relics
item.description: Adds randomized affixes to found equipment, introducing mundane, corrupted, and temporally enhanced

item.title: Gatbata's Sawians
item.description: Adds some of the Sawians from Gunsaw and Casualties: Unknown (expies and the like)

item.title: Jelly Bundle
item.description: A compilation of tweaks for the Swamp Jelly server.

item.title: fish(wastaken)'s GlooMe Patch
item.description: small patch for GlooMeClasses to better suit my personal tastes.

item.title: Boric Alchemy
item.description: Boric Alchemy adds chemical routes to create and refine resources, and create alchemical marvels!

item.title: Akira's Tweaks
item.description: Collection of patches for a personal server.

item.title: Vintage Rift - Client
item.description: Client only code for the Vintage Rift server
